data.body: MERGED 513 (#3 exit-11 fix). BUT 5147 close FAILED: AC also requires a CHEAP RE-SIGN path (re-persist signature from REVIEW_RESULT sidecar without re-running LLM) — I'd scoped that as follow-up; verifier enforces it. Delegated cheap-re-sign feature to subagent (--sign-only or sign-review reading sidecar + material-fingerprint staleness guard + attest.sign_plan_review; hermetic test). 509(#1) failed the pre-existing test_graph_build_scales_linearly perf FLAKE (ratio 3.36; also hit 517) -> rebased to re-CI. Rebased 509 515 517 518 onto current tip 998cb442 (513 merge). BUGS CLOSED: #5 #4 #7 #10 #2 (5) + skill. Pending: #3(5147, needs cheap-re-sign) #1(509) #9(515) #6(517) #8(518) + 3b4e(delete/init tests). Merged Gerrit: 507 508 510 512 513 514 516 519.
